name: Deployment Issue
about: Report a problem with the GitHub Pages deployment
title: '[DEPLOY] '
labels: deployment
assignees: ''

---

## Describe the Issue
A clear description of what went wrong with the deployment.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Pushed changes to '...'
2. Workflow started '...'
3. Error occurred '...'

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Workflow Run
Link to the failed GitHub Actions run:
https://github.com/universalwifisupport/UNIVERSAL/actions/runs/[RUN_ID]

## Error Messages
```
Paste any error messages here
```

## Environment
- Branch: main
- Commit: [commit hash]
- Date/Time: [when it happened]

## Additional Context
Any other information that might help resolve the issue.

## Checklist
- [ ] I checked the Actions tab for error logs
- [ ] I tested the build locally with `npm run build`
- [ ] I verified DNS settings are correct
- [ ] I checked that GitHub Pages is set to "GitHub Actions"
